description: Fix monster hostage-taking. The user reports that currently monsters cannot be taken as hostages. Code review shows the filter logic in BattlePanel.tsx appears correct (allows type 'monster' except daimyo-type), but there may be an issue with how the hostage selection interacts with the step-by-step battle mode, or there may be an issue with how battle participants are filtered.
steps: In src/components/BattlePanel.tsx around line 848-855, verify the capturableFigures filter includes monsters correctly. Current code: `if (f.type === 'bushi' || f.type === 'shinto' || f.type === 'monster') return true;` - this should work.

Check if the issue is that in step-by-step mode, by the time hostage selection occurs, the monster figures have been removed from the province by seppuku or Fire Dragon (once implemented). If seppuku killed the monster, it wouldn't be available for hostage - this is correct game behavior.

Check if there's a filter that restricts capturable figures to only those belonging to battle PARTICIPANTS. The current filter only checks `f.owner !== battleResolutionData.hostageWinnerId` - it does NOT restrict to participants. But there might be a bug where non-participant figures shouldn't be capturable (or vice versa).
Check the server-side logic at src/server/index.ts line 956-958 which validates hostage captures in online mode - it has the same monster-allowing logic. Ensure it matches.

The most likely issue: If the monster's owner is the same as the hostage winner (e.g., the player owns the monster), it would be filtered out. Check if there's a case where the monster is showing as owned by the hostage winner incorrectly.

Another possibility: the `capturableFigures` check needs to also ensure the figure's owner is a battle participant. Add this filter: `if (!battle.participants.includes(f.owner)) return false;` - this prevents capturing figures from players who happen to have figures in the province but aren't battle participants (e.g., only have a fortress).
acceptance_criteria: Monsters (non-daimyo type) can be selected as hostage targets during the take-hostage phase
Daimyo-type monsters (Yurei, Fukurokuju) cannot be taken as hostages
Regular daimyo figures cannot be taken as hostages
